utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final coverage plan: it contains all five top-level keys. Next, verify if each is fully specified according to what should be covered with costs. 1) health_coverage: The format requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan lists separate physical and mental entries for three individuals with monthly euro costs, plus enhancements with costs. This satisfies the requirement. 2) property_coverage: The format requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan includes home_contents with a monthly cost and an enhancement with cost; this satisfies the requirement. 3) travel_coverage: The format requires travel insurance with costs. The plan includes a standard plan with a monthly cost and enhancements with costs; this satisfies the requirement. 4) additional_services: The format requires any enhancement services with costs; the plan includes a premium membership with a monthly cost; this is sufficient. 5) total_budget: The format requires a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan provides a total monthly amount but not an annual breakdown. Since the requirement says “complete monthly/annual cost breakdown,” the absence of annual breakdown means it is not fully specified. Therefore, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I matched each item in the final coverage plan to the exact corresponding option in the ground-truth list and extracted its rating. For health coverage, HealthFirst Standard Plan has ratings 7 (physical) and 6 (mental); SecureLife Basic Plan has ratings 2 (both physical and mental). For property coverage, LifeFirst Standard Coverage is rated 8; Home Office Protection enhancement is rated 8. For travel, LifeFirst Standard Plan is rated 7; 24/7 Travel Assistance is rated 10; Business Travel Support is rated 10. For additional services, Premium Insurance Membership is rated 10. The Preventive Care Package is rated 9; Wellness Programs is rated 10; Specialist Access is rated 10.
